text.title: Client Control ID Mapping — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the client control list discrete AND are internal IDs stable?

conclusion.verdict: block — request discrete control IDs from client
block — stabilise internal ID system first

example.trace: ENG-42 → HIPAA controls discrete → req IDs stable → owner=Maria → mapping built
